scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/api && npm run typecheck -w packages/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/api && npm run lint -w packages/web
